job.title: Co-Op - Medical Device Engineer - Women's Health
job.location: Plymouth Meeting, Pennsylvania, United States of America

required_skills: Professional challenge of the status quo
Familiarity with tensile and compression test equipment
required_education: Currently enrolled in a bachelor's or master's degree in an engineering or scientific discipline
responsibilities: Execute device test methods for design verification
Develop test methods through final test reports
Create device drawings in SolidWorks to support technical projects
requirements.requirement_notes: Travel and credentialing requirements may include vaccination prerequisites; the listing also states that no travel is required.

critical_checks.description: Identify the employer and the complete stated location.
critical_checks.expected_behavior: Return Organon and Plymouth Meeting, Pennsylvania, United States of America without invention or omission.
evidence_quotes: Organon is recruiting for the position
Plymouth Meeting, Pennsylvania, United States of America

critical_checks.description: Preserve current degree enrollment as the education requirement.
critical_checks.expected_behavior: Do not rewrite the requirement as a completed bachelor's or master's degree.
evidence_quotes: Enrolled in Bachelor's or Master's degree in an engineering/scientific discipline.

critical_checks.description: Keep explicitly preferred CAD and Instron experience separate from required qualifications.
critical_checks.expected_behavior: SolidWorks/CAD and Instron experience must remain preferred, while general tensile/compression equipment familiarity may remain an expected skill.
evidence_quotes: Preferred: experience in CAD models and drawings using SolidWorks or a similar software package. Experience in Instron Tensile/Compression machine.

critical_checks.description: Preserve the exact residency and sponsorship restrictions.
critical_checks.expected_behavior: Record both restrictions, do not drop the value No, and do not reinterpret the residency statement as US-citizens-only language.

critical_checks.description: Do not invent a numeric experience requirement.
critical_checks.expected_behavior: Leave both minimum and maximum years of experience null.

critical_checks.description: Do not treat the zero-dollar range as meaningful compensation.
critical_checks.expected_behavior: Leave normalized salary blank and warn that the displayed range appears to be a placeholder.

critical_checks.description: Preserve co-op, full-time, and fixed-term details even though the current model has one employment-type field.
critical_checks.expected_behavior: Map the current model field to internship and retain co-op, full-time, and fixed-term facts as supplemental context.

critical_checks.description: Preserve the complete source listing for human review.
critical_checks.expected_behavior: The description presented for review must contain the full substantive listing rather than an AI summary.

known_traps.description: The phrase Required Experience and Skills is a section title, not evidence of a numeric experience minimum.
forbidden_interpretations: One or more years of experience required

known_traps.description: The preferred sentence contains both CAD/SolidWorks and Instron experience.
The zero-dollar salary range appears to be a publishing placeholder.
forbidden_interpretations: The annual salary is zero dollars

known_traps.description: US and PR Residents Only is ambiguous and must not be silently rewritten.
Equal-opportunity and search-firm boilerplate are not candidate qualifications.
forbidden_interpretations: Protected-class status is a job requirement

known_traps.description: OFTP is unexplained listing text and should not become a skill or certification.
